title: DSCI Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 16 Junior Resident Posts
description: Delhi State Cancer Institute (DSCI) has announced the latest job notification for the recruitment of 16 Junior Resident Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the MBBS can grab this chance and apply for the DSCI Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the walk-in at the address below. If you are looking for more, here is a list o...
